summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Aurora F&B ERP Phase 7A - Self-Service Configuration UI for non-approval business rules. Backend API functionality is working well with 84.6% success rate. Frontend configuration pages load successfully without console errors.

validation_issues.issue: Validation error returns 422 instead of expected 400 status code

authentication_issues.impact: Cannot test RBAC permissions for non-admin users

integration_issues.issue: HR service charge calculation fails with test outlet ID (422 Outlet tidak ditemukan)
integration_issues.impact: Cannot fully test HR integration with business rules

navigation_issues.issue: Element stability issues when clicking navigation tabs programmatically
navigation_issues.note: Direct URL navigation works fine, likely a timing issue in automated testing

passed_tests: List rules by type for all 4 rule types (sales_input_schema, petty_cash_policy, service_charge_policy, incentive_policy)
Phase 6 regression tests (finance periods, approvals queue, approval workflows)
All 5 configuration pages load without console errors

medium_priority: Fix outlet@torado.id test credentials or create proper non-admin user for RBAC testing
Update HR service charge integration test to use valid outlet ID from master data
low_priority: Consider returning 400 instead of 422 for validation errors to match API conventions
Improve element stability in frontend navigation for better automated testing
